default.value: TASK: Research EQ8, QuiltAssistant, QuiltPro, PreQuilt - analyze features, pricing, strengths, weaknesses
PRIORITY:HIGH|Research and analyze: EQ8, QuiltAssistant, QuiltPro, PreQuilt. Document features, pricing, UX, strengths, weaknesses. Create comparison matrix.
PRIORITY:HIGH|Evaluate tech stacks: Next.js 14 vs Remix, Tailwind CSS, tRPC vs GraphQL, PostgreSQL vs SQLite. Consider DX, performance, AI integration.
PRIORITY:HIGH|Design system architecture: components, data flow, API structure, deployment strategy, scalability plan.
PRIORITY:HIGH|Analyze quilter needs: pain points with current tools, desired features, workflow patterns, skill levels.
PRIORITY:MEDIUM|Design AI features: pattern generation, style transfer, color recommendations, difficulty assessment.
PRIORITY:MEDIUM|Create POC: SVG-based pattern engine with basic shapes, transformations, and rendering.

All project knowledge files created: QUILTOGRAPHER-KNOWLEDGE-BASE.md (main reference), PREFERENCES-AND-INSTRUCTIONS.md (how to work), QUICK-REFERENCE.md (quick access), CLAUDE-CODE-SETUP.md (installation). Ready for Claude Code installation.
